video_title: AI B-roll: Notebook Test Log (candle making)

seconds.vision_desc: open spiral notebook with pencil beside lit candle jar, soft window light, shallow focus
camera drifts slowly closer over the notebook, handwriting soft and unreadable, candle flame steady
pencil resting across ruled columns of blurred figures, candle glowing warm at right
slow dolly continues, notebook page fills more of frame, flame flickers gently
close view of notebook spiral and pencil tip, candle bokeh in background
page texture and soft handwriting lines, warm light across the bench
candle flame steady in soft focus, notebook dominant in frame
final close framing of logbook and pencil beside the burning jar candle
